name: Barbecued Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
Requires marinating and a long cooking time but is simple. Place chicken wings in a large flat pan. Combine the other ingredients and pour over the chicken.
Let stand for at least 1 hour or overnight. Ensure all wings are well coated with marinade. Place the pan in an oven set to 350°F and reduce the heat to 250°F. Bake for 4-5 hours, turning the wings at regular intervals. If not all of the marinade is absorbed, remove any remaining liquid and dry the wings out a bit longer in the oven (but do not overcook) before serving.
